notes: Small self-contained file (131 lines, 13 declarations) defining the Galois group action on L-rational points and divisors of a smooth plane curve over F, with the Galois-fixed divisor subgroup. No sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides, all proofs are ≤10 lines; the file is only imported by the root HasseWeil.lean umbrella and none of its declarations are referenced by other project files, making the entire file effectively external-API-only.
